title: Taylor's Eye Witness Maple 4 Piece 18.5cm Dessert Spoon Set with Fine Polished Finish - Rust Resistant 430 Stainless Steel Kitchen Cutlery. Perfect for Dessert, Snacks, Tea & Coffee. 5 Year Guarantee
features: PREMIUM-GRADE 430 STAINLESS STEEL DESSERT SPOONS – Many dessert spoons bend under pressure, rust over time, & lose their durability with frequent use. Taylor's Eye Witness dessert spoons are built differently! They are forged from high-quality 430 stainless steel, a durable material recognised for its ferritic microstructure, which provides superior resistance to corrosion & everyday wear. With a precise 2.5mm handle gauge for added rigidity, they resist bending & deformation under normal use.

FINE MIRROR-POLISHED FINISH FOR A SLEEK, ELEGANT LOOK – Standard spoons develop scratches, water stains, & dull surfaces that degrade your dining experience. These tablespoons feature a fine polished finish, providing a naturally smooth, non-porous surface that is resistant to micro-scratches & discolouration. And they won’t look out of place at even the most sophisticated dinner parties. Unlike low-quality cutlery, these spoons retain their lustre even after repeated use & washing.

PERFECT FOR EVERYDAY DINING, SERVING, AND COOKING – Using spoons that are too small for serving or too large for comfortable use can be inconvenient. Not with our tablespoons! Combining practicality & style in equal measure, their 20cm length ensures optimal reach—whether for eating, portioning, or stirring—while the deep-set, elliptical bowl maximises scooping efficiency for liquids, grains, & semi-solid foods. Plus, its ergonomic handle provides a stable, balanced grip & precise control.

EASY TO CLEAN AND 100% DISHWASHER SAFE – Some spoons trap food particles, stain easily, or require excessive scrubbing to clean properly. But Taylor's Eye Witness tablespoons feature a smooth, non-reactive stainless steel surface that prevents food from sticking & ensures effortless cleaning. Fully dishwasher-safe, they withstand high temperatures & repeated wash cycles without dulling or corroding. Plus, its design minimises crevices where residue can accumulate, maintaining optimal hygiene.

BUILT TO LAST, BACKED BY A 5-YEAR GUARANTEE – Many spoons lose their shape, break, or show signs of wear within months. But not ours. Our tablespoons are constructed to maintain long-term performance. Here at Taylor's Eye Witness, we’re so confident in the strength & quality of our product that any item found compromised will be replaced without charge, subject to normal household use. We've been making kitchen tools for over 150 years & pride ourselves on the reliability of our products.
description: No More Weak, Rusty Spoons Ever struggled to scoop a dense, creamy dessert only to feel your spoon flex under pressure? Or pulled a spoon from the dishwasher to find unsightly rust spots dulling its finish? These are common pitfalls of subpar cutlery. That’s why Taylor’s Eye Witness Dessert Spoons are meticulously engineered from high-grade 430 stainless steel —a material renowned for its ferritic microstructure, offering superior resistance to corrosion and everyday wear . With a precisely measured 2.5 mm handle gauge, these spoons maintain structural integrity, ensuring a firm grip and lasting durability. Superior Craftsmanship, Every Time Standard spoons develop micro-abrasions, lose their shine, and feel rough over time. Ours, however, boast a fine mirror-polished finish , minimising surface porosity and preventing discolouration, scratches, and water stains. The result? A refined aesthetic that retains its lustre, perfect for both casual meals and elegant dining. Ergonomically designed at 18.5 cm, these spoons are ideal for delicately layering a parfait, enjoying a rich custard, or precisely stirring an espresso. The gently curved, oval bowl allows for effortless scooping, ensuring a smooth, controlled experience with every bite. Built for Hygiene & Durability Low-quality spoons trap food particles in crevices, leading to bacterial buildup and excessive scrubbing. Taylor’s Eye Witness spoons feature a non-porous, non-reactive stainless steel surface that repels food residues for effortless cleaning. Fully dishwasher-safe , they withstand high-temperature wash cycles without losing integrity, resisting thermal expansion and deformation. To reinforce our commitment to excellence, we back our cutlery with a 5-year guarantee —because precision engineering deserves unwavering confidence.
